description: Valid CPT code 71046 (Chest X-Ray PA and Lateral) for a real imaging procedure, but the patient's insurance plan (PLAN-BASIC) only covers a narrow set of lab and low-complexity office visit codes — imaging is explicitly excluded. Agent must validate code (valid), verify insurance (not covered), then reject the claim.

context.reported_procedure: Chest X-Ray PA and Lateral — performed at Metro General Radiology (in-network). Patient: Susan K., 35F. Study date 2024-03-22. Ordered by Dr. P. Sharma, Emergency Medicine, to evaluate right lower quadrant pain with associated cough and mild dyspnoea. Two-view chest radiograph performed; findings documented in separate radiology report (Accession RAD-2024-04421).
context.clinical_notes: PLAN-BASIC is a restricted preventive-care plan covering routine laboratory panels and low-complexity office visits only. Diagnostic imaging, specialist consultations, and in-patient procedures require separate prior-authorisation under an upgraded plan tier.
